error_signature: enterprise feature doesn’t handle the ENCRYPTION_KEY rotation
title: Issues with rotating N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY in enterprise version
symptom: Users may encounter problems when attempting to rotate the N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY, leading to potential credential loss.
not_this_if: Using a non-enterprise version of n8n
root_cause: The enterprise version of n8n does not properly handle the rotation of the ENCRYPTION_KEY, which can lead to issues with credential management and application stability.
fix_steps: Delete settings from the n8n database using the command: delete FROM public.settings where key='feature.externalSecrets' OR key='features.sourceControl.sshKeys';
Open a shell on the n8n pod.
Delete the n8n config file: rm -f ${HOME}/.n8n/config.
Generate a new encryption key and update the environment variable.
Delete the temporary credentials file: rm -f /data/credentials.json.
agent_instruction: Follow the steps to rotate the N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY without losing credentials.
safety_notes: Ensure to back up the database to prevent data loss.
